Ancient Lcea's Lament  

Description

1: Increase Hitpoints by 9 per tick.
2: Increase Mana by 5 (L60) to 26 (L130) per tick

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 0 Skill: Stringed
Casting Time: 3 Recast Time: 0
Fizzle Time: 0 Range: 0
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
AE Range: 60 Deletable: No
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: Yes Target Type: AE PC v2
Spell Type: Beneficial Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: You feel replenished.
Effect Fades: Lcea's lament fades from your mind.

Game Description

A light chorus that regenerates the health, mana, and stamina of nearby allies.

Items with this effect

  • Ancient: Lcea's Lament

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Ancient: Lcea's Lament
ClassLevel
BRD60
Expansion:

Duration:
2 ticks
  • Comments (16)
  • Dropped By (15)
  • Screenshots
Post Comment
2019 Mangler
QuoteReply
# Nov 07 2019 at 12:52 PM Rating: Decent
ibc93
Scholar
47 posts
Got this spell off of Vulak`Aer during Velious on Mangler. It is PB AOE that overwrites the lvl 55 catata song. It does not require you to be in a group or raid with anyone. So long as the other person is in range, they can receive this song's effects. It's aggro generation also doesn't appear to be as concerning anymore in 2019 as previously mentioned in prior posts. I have yet to have grabbed aggro over a DPSer or tank engaged on a mob while using this song.

Mana
QuoteReply
# Feb 19 2004 at 2:25 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591797750209
16 posts
I want to understand why bards have manabar if they dont even need mana to sing. Can someone tell me?
russian_enchantress@hotmail.com)
▲ Page top
RE: Mana
QuoteReply
# May 14 2004 at 10:04 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591787902168
View User Forum
Scholar
28 posts
Personal experience.... I ran into the factory in POI for a raid singing my AE song. Mind you, we were just grouping, and a few folks decide to pull yard trash. Just think about the aggro I had buffing 60+ folks with hps and mana... I went down before anyone knew what was going on.
▲ Page top
RE: Mana
QuoteReply
# Mar 10 2004 at 3:10 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1615767697516
12 posts
Bards have a mana bar and they have about 3 songs that require mana. Solon's Bewitching Bravura which is a charm spell and uses 60 mana a cast that may be used in charm-kiting so bards would need to keep and eye on their mana. Also, there is Denon's Desperate Dirge use 800 mana points, another charm spe; Call of the Banshee uses 90 points of mana.

Spaseba, Vax
▲ Page top
RE: Mana
QuoteReply
# Nov 01 2004 at 10:09 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966344679
View User Forum
28 posts
Don't forget Faded Memories AA ability at 900 mana a use, you'll be trying to get that mana pool bigger once you discover the joys of FM.

Edited, Mon Nov 1 10:11:36 2004
▲ Page top
What?
QuoteReply
# Sep 15 2003 at 3:54 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760281063
61 posts
Im a 43 bard looking forward into the world =P.And I was wondering why is it bad to warriors? And what the heck is Target Type:AC PCv2?
▲ Page top
RE: What?
QuoteReply
# Feb 06 2004 at 6:55 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592343554927
32 posts
Why is it bad for warriors? answer = aggro

Healing causes about as much aggro as causing damage...so heres the situation on a raid. You have the mob cornered, 1 warrior in front of it, 20 odd other mellees behind it, 20-30 casters in the background doing their thing. MOB lights a PB AOE that does 200 damage to everyone in Vicinity....no big woop. Next tick, Bard heals every person 32pts (stringed mod of Tear Shaped ring or epic) and creates 50x32= 1600 pts of aggro. Same next tic. Mob turns around, all melees take Riposte damage of about 500 a tic, Healers go Crazy trying to heal, Bard dies first, everyone else soon follows.

Aggro Control, A Wizzy with Tourrets Syndrome is a raids worst nightmare.
▲ Page top
RE: What?
QuoteReply
# Oct 03 2003 at 1:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760179139
Scholar
24 posts
I believe AE PC v2 is like a MGB type spell. This song effects every Player Character within 60' regardless of group affiliations. I believe this song, like other Ancients, only drops in places such as NToV, VT and Sleepers Tomb. Please correct me if my information is incorrect.

Hope this Helps =)
▲ Page top
Yep, dead Warriors
QuoteReply
# Oct 09 2002 at 6:27 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592253703557
3 posts
No casters: Dead every one including Warriors, death does tend to make things difficult for Warriors, , hrmm, everyone come to think of it

Mnemnath.
A Ceric.
